Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. An unsolicited guide to being a researcher [pdf] 148 upvotes, 21 comments
  2. An incoherent Rust 74 upvotes, 13 comments
  3. Finding all regex matches has always been O(n²) 123 upvotes, 30 comments
  4. BIO: The Bao I/O Coprocessor 99 upvotes, 26 comments
  5. Autoresearch on an old research idea 202 upvotes, 63 comments
  6. Dune3d: A parametric 3D CAD application 58 upvotes, 16 comments
  7. Side-Effectful Expressions in C (2023) 28 upvotes, 6 comments
  8. Trivy under attack again: Widespread GitHub Actions tag compromise secrets 127 upvotes, 47 comments
  9. Bombadil: Property-based testing for web UIs 213 upvotes, 86 comments
  10. GitHub appears to be struggling with measly three nines availability 417 upvotes, 214 comments
  11. iPhone 17 Pro Demonstrated Running a 400B LLM 415 upvotes, 222 comments
  12. “Collaboration” is bullshit 257 upvotes, 137 comments
  13. Local Stack Archived their GitHub repo and requires an account to run 112 upvotes, 55 comments
  14. Chat GPT 5.2 cannot explain the German word "geschniegelt" 14 upvotes, 3 comments
  15. Conway's Game of Life, in real life 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  16. Walmart: ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than website 384 upvotes, 254 comments
  17. Digs: iOS app that syncs your Discogs collection and lets you browse it offline 36 upvotes, 16 comments
  18. How I'm Productive with Claude Code 64 upvotes, 35 comments
  19. US and TotalEnergies reach 'nearly $1B' deal to end offshore wind projects 262 upvotes, 185 comments
  20. Migrating to the EU 793 upvotes, 618 comments
  21. Next-generation electricity is almost here 10 upvotes, 3 comments
  22. Bets on US-Iran ceasefire show signs of insider knowledge, say experts 124 upvotes, 97 comments
  23. Is it a pint? 163 upvotes, 139 comments
  24. AI Risks "Hypernormal" Science 43 upvotes, 30 comments
  25. I built an AI receptionist for a mechanic shop 181 upvotes, 201 comments
  26. Printable Claude Code Cheat Sheet (auto-updated daily) 7 upvotes, 3 comments
  27. General Motors is assisting with the restoration of a rare EV1 85 upvotes, 98 comments
  28. America tells private firms to "hack back" 72 upvotes, 85 comments
  29. The machine didn't take your craft. You gave it up. 5 upvotes, 2 comments
  30. Two pilots dead after plane and ground vehicle collide at LaGuardia 278 upvotes, 455 comments

Last generated 6:30am, 24 March 2026. Source here.
